title: Consolidated Customer Actions into Split Button Dropdown
root_cause: User requested cleaning up the top right action bar by moving secondary actions into a dropdown menu.
resolution: Implemented a Split Button dropdown for the 'Thêm khách hàng' primary button. Moved 'Nhập KH', 'Nhập Giá', 'Xuất Giá', 'Xuất CSV' into this dropdown menu.
